title: pavonia opulifolia
intro: Pavonia opulifolia, also known as Rose Mallow or Rock Rose, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Pavonia opulifolia is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
